ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an account. Implemented by PDS.
ast.target: 创建账户。由 PDS 实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Requested handle for the account.
ast.target: 请求的账户句柄。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pre-existing atproto DID, being imported to a new account.
ast.target: 预先存在的 atproto DID，正在导入到新账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Initial account password. May need to meet instance-specific password strength requirements.
ast.target: 初始账户密码。可能需要满足实例特定的密码强度要求。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DID PLC rotation key (aka, recovery key) to be included in PLC creation operation.
ast.target: DID PLC 轮换密钥（即恢复密钥），将包含在 PLC 创建操作中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A signed DID PLC operation to be submitted as part of importing an existing account to this instance. NOTE: this optional field may be updated when full account migration is implemented.
ast.target: 一个签名的 DID PLC 操作，作为将现有账户导入此实例的一部分提交。注意：此可选字段在实现完整账户迁移时可能会更新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Account login session returned on successful account creation.
ast.target: 成功创建账户后返回的账户登录会话。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The DID of the new account.
ast.target: 新账户的 DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Complete DID document.
ast.target: 完整的 DID 文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an App Password.
ast.target: 创建一个应用密码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short name for the App Password, to help distinguish them.
ast.target: 应用密码的简短名称，用于帮助区分它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If an app password has 'privileged' access to possibly sensitive account state. Meant for use with trusted clients.
ast.target: 如果应用密码对可能敏感的账户状态具有 '特权' 访问权限。旨在与受信任的客户端一起使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an invite code.
ast.target: 创建一个邀请码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create invite codes.
ast.target: 创建邀请码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an authentication session.
ast.target: 创建一个认证会话。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Handle or other identifier supported by the server for the authenticating user.
ast.target: 服务器支持的用于认证用户的句柄或其他标识符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If active=false, this optional field indicates a possible reason for why the account is not active. If active=false and no status is supplied, then the host makes no claim for why the repository is no longer being hosted.
ast.target: 如果 active=false，此可选字段指示账户不活跃的可能原因。如果 active=false 且未提供状态，则主机不对仓库不再托管的原因做出声明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deactivates a currently active account. Stops serving of repo, and future writes to repo until reactivated. Used to finalize account migration with the old host after the account has been activated on the new host.
ast.target: 停用当前活跃的账户。停止仓库的服务，并在重新激活之前禁止对仓库的写入。用于在账户在新主机上激活后，与旧主机完成账户迁移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A recommendation to server as to how long they should hold onto the deactivated account before deleting.
ast.target: 向服务器建议在删除之前应保留已停用账户多长时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete an actor's account with a token and password. Can only be called after requesting a deletion token. Requires auth.
ast.target: 使用令牌和密码删除参与者的账户。只能在请求删除令牌后调用。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete the current session. Requires auth.
ast.target: 删除当前会话。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the server's account creation requirements and capabilities. Implemented by PDS.
ast.target: 描述服务器的账户创建要求和功能。由 PDS 实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, an invite code must be supplied to create an account on this instance.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则必须提供邀请码才能在此实例上创建账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, a phone verification token must be supplied to create an account on this instance.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则必须提供电话验证令牌才能在此实例上创建账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of domain suffixes that can be used in account handles.
ast.target: 可用于账户句柄的域名后缀列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: URLs of service policy documents.
ast.target: 服务政策文档的URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contact information
ast.target: 联系信息

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get all invite codes for the current account. Requires auth.
ast.target: 获取当前账户的所有邀请码。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls whether any new 'earned' but not 'created' invites should be created.
ast.target: 控制是否应创建任何新的“已获得”但未“创建”的邀请。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a signed token on behalf of the requesting DID for the requested service.
ast.target: 为代表请求DID的请求服务获取签名令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The DID of the service that the token will be used to authenticate with
ast.target: 令牌将用于认证的服务的DID

ast.name: description
ast.source: The time in Unix Epoch seconds that the JWT expires. Defaults to 60 seconds in the future. The service may enforce certain time bounds on tokens depending on the requested scope.
ast.target: JWT过期的Unix纪元秒数。默认为未来60秒。服务可能会根据请求的范围对令牌强制执行某些时间限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lexicon (XRPC) method to bind the requested token to
ast.target: 将请求的令牌绑定到的词典（XRPC）方法

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the requested expiration date is not a valid. May be in the past or may be reliant on the requested scopes.
ast.target: 表示请求的过期日期无效。可能已过期或可能依赖于请求的范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get information about the current auth session. Requires auth.
ast.target: 获取当前认证会话的信息。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all App Passwords.
ast.target: 列出所有应用密码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Refresh an authentication session. Requires auth using the 'refreshJwt' (not the 'accessJwt').
ast.target: 刷新认证会话。需要使用'refreshJwt'（而非'accessJwt'）进行认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hosting status of the account. If not specified, then assume 'active'.
ast.target: 账户的托管状态。如果未指定，则假定为“活跃”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Initiate a user account deletion via email.
ast.target: 通过电子邮件发起用户账户删除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Request an email with a code to confirm ownership of email.
ast.target: 请求发送包含验证码的电子邮件以确认邮箱所有权。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Request a token in order to update email.
ast.target: 请求一个令牌以更新电子邮件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Initiate a user account password reset via email.
ast.target: 通过电子邮件发起用户账户密码重置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reserve a repo signing key, for use with account creation. Necessary so that a DID PLC update operation can be constructed during an account migraiton. Public and does not require auth; implemented by PDS. NOTE: this endpoint may change when full account migration is implemented.
ast.target: 预留一个仓库签名密钥，用于账户创建。这是必要的，以便在账户迁移期间可以构建DID PLC更新操作。公开且不需要认证；由PDS实现。注意：当完整账户迁移实现时，此端点可能会更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The DID to reserve a key for.
ast.target: 要为其预留密钥的DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The public key for the reserved signing key, in did:key serialization.
ast.target: 预留签名密钥的公钥，采用did:key序列化格式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reset a user account password using a token.
ast.target: 使用令牌重置用户账户密码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Revoke an App Password by name.
ast.target: 按名称撤销一个应用密码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update an account's email.
ast.target: 更新账户的电子邮件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Requires a token from com.atproto.sever.requestEmailUpdate if the account's email has been confirmed.
ast.target: 如果账户的电子邮件已确认，则需要来自com.atproto.sever.requestEmailUpdate的令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a blob associated with a given account. Returns the full blob as originally uploaded. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.
ast.target: 获取与给定账户关联的Blob。返回最初上传的完整Blob。不需要认证；由PDS实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The DID of the account.
ast.target: 账户的DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The CID of the blob to fetch
ast.target: 要获取的Blob的CID

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get data blocks from a given repo, by CID. For example, intermediate MST nodes, or records. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.
ast.target: 通过CID从给定仓库获取数据块。例如，中间MST节点或记录。不需要认证；由PDS实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The DID of the repo.
ast.target: 仓库的DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED - please use com.atproto.sync.getRepo instead
ast.target: 已弃用 - 请改用com.atproto.sync.getRepo

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED - please use com.atproto.sync.getLatestCommit instead
ast.target: 已弃用 - 请改用com.atproto.sync.getLatestCommit

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the current commit CID & revision of the specified repo. Does not require auth.
ast.target: 获取指定仓库的当前提交CID和修订版本。不需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get data blocks needed to prove the existence or non-existence of record in the current version of repo. Does not require auth.
ast.target: 获取在当前仓库版本中证明记录存在或不存在所需的数据块。不需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record Key
ast.target: 记录键

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED: referenced a repo commit by CID, and retrieved record as of that commit
ast.target: 已弃用：通过CID引用仓库提交，并检索该提交时的记录

ast.name: description
ast.source: Download a repository export as CAR file. Optionally only a 'diff' since a previous revision. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.
ast.target: 将仓库导出下载为CAR文件。可选择仅下载自上一修订版本以来的“差异”。不需要认证；由PDS实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The revision ('rev') of the repo to create a diff from.
ast.target: 要创建差异的仓库的修订版本（'rev'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the hosting status for a repository, on this server. Expected to be implemented by PDS and Relay.
ast.target: 获取此服务器上仓库的托管状态。预期由PDS和Relay实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional field, the current rev of the repo, if active=true
ast.target: 可选字段，如果active=true，则为仓库的当前修订版本

ast.name: description
ast.source: List blob CIDs for an account, since some repo revision. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS.
ast.target: 列出自某个仓库修订版本以来账户的Blob CID。不需要认证；由PDS实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional revision of the repo to list blobs since.
ast.target: 可选的仓库修订版本，用于列出自该版本以来的Blob。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enumerates all the DID, rev, and commit CID for all repos hosted by this service. Does not require auth; implemented by PDS and Relay.
ast.target: 枚举此服务托管的所有仓库的DID、修订版本和提交CID。不需要认证；由PDS和Relay实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Current repo commit CID
ast.target: 当前仓库提交CID

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notify a crawling service of a recent update, and that crawling should resume. Intended use is after a gap between repo stream events caused the crawling service to disconnect. Does not require auth; implemented by Relay.
ast.target: 通知爬取服务有最近的更新，并且爬取应恢复。预期用途是在仓库流事件之间的间隔导致爬取服务断开连接之后使用。不需要认证；由Relay实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hostname of the current service (usually a PDS) that is notifying of update.
ast.target: 当前服务（通常是PDS）的主机名，该服务正在通知更新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Request a service to persistently crawl hosted repos. Expected use is new PDS instances declaring their existence to Relays. Does not require auth.
ast.target: 请求服务持续爬取托管的仓库。预期用途是新的PDS实例向Relay声明其存在。不需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hostname of the current service (eg, PDS) that is requesting to be crawled.
ast.target: 当前服务（例如PDS）的主机名，该服务请求被爬取。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the consumer of the stream can not keep up with events, and a backlog gets too large, the server will drop the connection.
ast.target: 如果流的消费者无法跟上事件，并且积压变得太大，服务器将断开连接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an update of repository state. Note that empty commits are allowed, which include no repo data changes, but an update to rev and signature.
ast.target: 表示仓库状态的更新。请注意，允许空提交，即不包含仓库数据更改，但会更新修订版本和签名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stream sequence number of this message.
ast.target: 此消息的流序列号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED -- unused
ast.target: 已弃用 -- 未使用

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that this commit contained too many ops, or data size was too large. Consumers will need to make a separate request to get missing data.
ast.target: 表示此提交包含过多操作，或数据大小过大。消费者需要单独请求以获取缺失的数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The repo this event comes from.
ast.target: 此事件来源的仓库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Repo commit object CID.
ast.target: 仓库提交对象CID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED -- unused. WARNING -- nullable and optional; stick with optional to ensure golang interoperability.
ast.target: 已弃用 -- 未使用。警告 -- 可空且可选；坚持使用可选以确保golang互操作性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rev of the emitted commit. Note that this information is also in the commit object included in blocks, unless this is a tooBig event.
ast.target: 已发出提交的修订版本。请注意，此信息也包含在块中的提交对象中，除非这是一个tooBig事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rev of the last emitted commit from this repo (if any).
ast.target: 此仓库上一次发出的提交的修订版本（如果有）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: CAR file containing relevant blocks, as a diff since the previous repo state.
ast.target: 包含相关块的CAR文件，作为自上一仓库状态以来的差异。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of repo mutation operations in this commit (eg, records created, updated, or deleted).
ast.target: 此提交中的仓库变更操作列表（例如，创建、更新或删除的记录）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of new blobs (by CID) referenced by records in this commit.
ast.target: 此提交中记录引用的新Blob（按CID）列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Timestamp of when this message was originally broadcast.
ast.target: 此消息最初广播的时间戳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents a change to an account's identity. Could be an updated handle, signing key, or pds hosting endpoint. Serves as a prod to all downstream services to refresh their identity cache.
ast.target: 表示账户身份的更改。可能是更新的句柄、签名密钥或PDS托管端点。作为对所有下游服务的提示，以刷新其身份缓存。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The current handle for the account, or 'handle.invalid' if validation fails. This field is optional, might have been validated or passed-through from an upstream source. Semantics and behaviors for PDS vs Relay may evolve in the future; see atproto specs for more details.
ast.target: 账户的当前句柄，如果验证失败则为'handle.invalid'。此字段是可选的，可能已验证或从上游源传递。PDS与Relay的语义和行为未来可能会演变；有关更多详细信息，请参阅atproto规范。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the account has a repository which can be fetched from the host that emitted this event.
ast.target: 表示账户有一个仓库，可以从发出此事件的主机获取。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If active=false, this optional field indicates a reason for why the account is not active.
ast.target: 如果active=false，此可选字段指示账户不活跃的原因。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED -- Use #identity event instead
ast.target: 已弃用 -- 改用#identity事件

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED -- Use #account event instead
ast.target: 已弃用 -- 改用#account事件

ast.name: description
ast.source: A repo operation, ie a mutation of a single record.
ast.target: 一个仓库操作，即单个记录的变更。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For creates and updates, the new record CID. For deletions, null.
ast.target: 对于创建和更新，是新记录的CID。对于删除，则为null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check accounts location in signup queue.
ast.target: 检查账户在注册队列中的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED: use queryLabels or subscribeLabels instead -- Fetch all labels from a labeler created after a certain date.
ast.target: 已弃用：改用queryLabels或subscribeLabels -- 获取标签器在特定日期之后创建的所有标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Request a verification code to be sent to the supplied phone number
ast.target: 请求向提供的电话号码发送验证码

ast.name: description
ast.source: Metadata about the requesting account's relationship with the subject account. Only has meaningful content for authed requests.
ast.target: 关于请求账户与目标账户关系的元数据。仅对已认证的请求具有实际意义。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The subject's followers whom you also follow
ast.target: 目标账户的粉丝中你也关注的人

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which labeler does this preference apply to? If undefined, applies globally.
ast.target: 此偏好适用于哪个标签器？如果未定义，则全局适用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The birth date of account owner.
ast.target: 账户所有者的出生日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URI of the feed, or an identifier which describes the feed.
ast.target: 信息流的URI，或描述信息流的标识符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hide replies in the feed.
ast.target: 在信息流中隐藏回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hide replies in the feed if they are not by followed users.
ast.target: 如果回复不是由关注的用户发出的，则在信息流中隐藏回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hide replies in the feed if they do not have this number of likes.
ast.target: 如果回复没有达到此数量的点赞，则在信息流中隐藏回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hide reposts in the feed.
ast.target: 在信息流中隐藏转发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hide quote posts in the feed.
ast.target: 在信息流中隐藏引用帖子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sorting mode for threads.
ast.target: 线程的排序模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show followed users at the top of all replies.
ast.target: 在所有回复顶部显示已关注的用户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of tags which describe the account owner's interests gathered during onboarding.
ast.target: 在入门过程中收集的描述账户所有者兴趣的标签列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A word that the account owner has muted.
ast.target: 账户所有者已屏蔽的一个词。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The muted word itself.
ast.target: 被屏蔽的词本身。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The intended targets of the muted word.
ast.target: 被屏蔽词的预期目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Groups of users to apply the muted word to. If undefined, applies to all users.
ast.target: 应用被屏蔽词的用户组。如果未定义，则适用于所有用户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The date and time at which the muted word will expire and no longer be applied.
ast.target: 被屏蔽词将过期且不再应用的日期和时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of words the account owner has muted.
ast.target: 账户所有者已屏蔽的词语列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of URIs of posts the account owner has hidden.
ast.target: 账户所有者已隐藏的帖子URI列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A grab bag of state that's specific to the bsky.app program. Third-party apps shouldn't use this.
ast.target: 特定于bsky.app程序的状态集合。第三方应用不应使用此字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An array of tokens which identify nudges (modals, popups, tours, highlight dots) that should be shown to the user.
ast.target: 标识应向用户显示的提示（模态框、弹出窗口、导览、高亮点）的令牌数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Storage for NUXs the user has encountered.
ast.target: 用户已遇到的新用户体验（NUX）存储。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set, an active progress guide. Once completed, can be set to undefined. Should have unspecced fields tracking progress.
ast.target: 如果设置，则为活跃的进度指南。完成后，可设置为未定义。应具有未指定的字段来跟踪进度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A new user experiences (NUX) storage object
ast.target: 新用户体验（NUX）存储对象

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arbitrary data for the NUX. The structure is defined by the NUX itself. Limited to 300 characters.
ast.target: NUX的任意数据。结构由NUX本身定义。限制为300个字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The date and time at which the NUX will expire and should be considered completed.
ast.target: NUX将过期并应视为已完成的日期和时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get private preferences attached to the current account. Expected use is synchronization between multiple devices, and import/export during account migration. Requires auth.
ast.target: 获取附加到当前账户的私有偏好设置。预期用途是在多台设备之间同步，以及在账户迁移期间进行导入/导出。需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get detailed profile view of an actor. Does not require auth, but contains relevant metadata with auth.
ast.target: 获取某个参与者的详细个人资料视图。不需要认证，但包含认证后的相关元数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Handle or DID of account to fetch profile of.
ast.target: 要获取个人资料的账户的句柄或DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get detailed profile views of multiple actors.
ast.target: 获取多个参与者的详细个人资料视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a list of suggested actors. Expected use is discovery of accounts to follow during new account onboarding.
ast.target: 获取推荐参与者列表。预期用途是在新账户注册期间发现可关注的账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A declaration of a Bluesky account profile.
ast.target: Bluesky账户个人资料的声明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Free-form profile description text.
ast.target: 自由格式的个人简介描述文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Small image to be displayed next to posts from account. AKA, 'profile picture'
ast.target: 显示在账户帖子旁边的小图片。即“头像”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Larger horizontal image to display behind profile view.
ast.target: 显示在个人资料视图背后的较大水平图片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Self-label values, specific to the Bluesky application, on the overall account.
ast.target: 针对整个账户的、特定于Bluesky应用的自标签值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set the private preferences attached to the account.
ast.target: 设置附加到账户的私有偏好设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find actors (profiles) matching search criteria. Does not require auth.
ast.target: 查找符合搜索条件的参与者（个人资料）。不需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED: use 'q' instead.
ast.target: 已弃用：请改用'q'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query string. Syntax, phrase, boolean, and faceting is unspecified, but Lucene query syntax is recommended.
ast.target: 搜索查询字符串。语法、短语、布尔值和分面未指定，但推荐使用Lucene查询语法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find actor suggestions for a prefix search term. Expected use is for auto-completion during text field entry. Does not require auth.
ast.target: 为前缀搜索词查找参与者建议。预期用途是在文本字段输入期间进行自动补全。不需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query prefix; not a full query string.
ast.target: 搜索查询前缀；不是完整的查询字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: width:height represents an aspect ratio. It may be approximate, and may not correspond to absolute dimensions in any given unit.
ast.target: 宽:高表示宽高比。它可能是近似的，并且可能不对应于任何给定单位的绝对尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A representation of some externally linked content (eg, a URL and 'card'), embedded in a Bluesky record (eg, a post).
ast.target: 嵌入在Bluesky记录（例如帖子）中的外部链接内容（例如URL和“卡片”）的表示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A set of images embedded in a Bluesky record (eg, a post).
ast.target: 嵌入在Bluesky记录（例如帖子）中的一组图片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alt text description of the image, for accessibility.
ast.target: 图片的替代文本描述，用于无障碍访问。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fully-qualified URL where a thumbnail of the image can be fetched. For example, CDN location provided by the App View.
ast.target: 可获取图片缩略图的完整URL。例如，由App View提供的CDN位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fully-qualified URL where a large version of the image can be fetched. May or may not be the exact original blob. For example, CDN location provided by the App View.
ast.target: 可获取图片大版本的完整URL。可能不是精确的原始blob。例如，由App View提供的CDN位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A representation of a record embedded in a Bluesky record (eg, a post). For example, a quote-post, or sharing a feed generator record.
ast.target: 嵌入在Bluesky记录（例如帖子）中的记录的表示。例如，引用帖子或分享一个信息流生成器记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The record data itself.
ast.target: 记录数据本身。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A representation of a record embedded in a Bluesky record (eg, a post), alongside other compatible embeds. For example, a quote post and image, or a quote post and external URL card.
ast.target: 嵌入在Bluesky记录（例如帖子）中的记录的表示，与其他兼容的嵌入内容并列。例如，引用帖子和图片，或引用帖子和外部URL卡片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A video embedded in a Bluesky record (eg, a post).
ast.target: 嵌入在Bluesky记录（例如帖子）中的视频。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alt text description of the video, for accessibility.
ast.target: 视频的替代文本描述，用于无障碍访问。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Metadata about the requesting account's relationship with the subject content. Only has meaningful content for authed requests.
ast.target: 关于请求账户与主题内容关系的元数据。仅对认证请求有实际意义。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Context provided by feed generator that may be passed back alongside interactions.
ast.target: 由信息流生成器提供的上下文，可能在交互时传回。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When parent is a reply to another post, this is the author of that post.
ast.target: 当父帖子是对另一篇帖子的回复时，这是那篇帖子的作者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Context that will be passed through to client and may be passed to feed generator back alongside interactions.
ast.target: 将传递给客户端的上下文，并可能在交互时传递给信息流生成器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Context on a feed item that was originally supplied by the feed generator on getFeedSkeleton.
ast.target: 关于信息流项目的上下文，最初由信息流生成器在getFeedSkeleton时提供。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Request that less content like the given feed item be shown in the feed
ast.target: 请求在信息流中减少显示类似给定信息流项目的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Request that more content like the given feed item be shown in the feed
ast.target: 请求在信息流中增加显示类似给定信息流项目的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User clicked through to the feed item
ast.target: 用户点击进入了信息流项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User clicked through to the author of the feed item
ast.target: 用户点击进入了信息流项目的作者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User clicked through to the reposter of the feed item
ast.target: 用户点击进入了信息流项目的转发者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User clicked through to the embedded content of the feed item
ast.target: 用户点击进入了信息流项目的嵌入内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Feed item was seen by user
ast.target: 信息流项目被用户看到。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User liked the feed item
ast.target: 用户点赞了信息流项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User reposted the feed item
ast.target: 用户转发了信息流项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User replied to the feed item
ast.target: 用户回复了信息流项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User quoted the feed item
ast.target: 用户引用了信息流项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User shared the feed item
ast.target: 用户分享了信息流项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get information about a feed generator, including policies and offered feed URIs. Does not require auth; implemented by Feed Generator services (not App View).
ast.target: 获取关于信息流生成器的信息，包括策略和提供的信息流URI。不需要认证；由信息流生成器服务（而非App View）实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record declaring of the existence of a feed generator, and containing metadata about it. The record can exist in any repository.
ast.target: 声明信息流生成器存在并包含其元数据的记录。该记录可以存在于任何仓库中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Declaration that a feed accepts feedback interactions from a client through app.bsky.feed.sendInteractions
ast.target: 声明信息流接受来自客户端通过app.bsky.feed.sendInteractions的反馈交互。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Self-label values
ast.target: 自标签值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a list of feeds (feed generator records) created by the actor (in the actor's repo).
ast.target: 获取由参与者（在参与者的仓库中）创建的信息流（信息流生成器记录）列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a list of posts liked by an actor. Requires auth, actor must be the requesting account.
ast.target: 获取参与者点赞的帖子列表。需要认证，参与者必须是请求账户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a view of an actor's 'author feed' (post and reposts by the author). Does not require auth.
ast.target: 获取参与者的“作者信息流”（作者的帖子和转发）视图。不需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Combinations of post/repost types to include in response.
ast.target: 要在响应中包含的帖子/转发类型的组合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a hydrated feed from an actor's selected feed generator. Implemented by App View.
ast.target: 从参与者选择的信息流生成器获取一个完整的信息流。由App View实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get information about a feed generator. Implemented by AppView.
ast.target: 获取关于信息流生成器的信息。由AppView实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: AT-URI of the feed generator record.
ast.target: 信息流生成器记录的AT-URI。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates whether the feed generator service has been online recently, or else seems to be inactive.
ast.target: 指示信息流生成器服务最近是否在线，或者似乎处于非活动状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates whether the feed generator service is compatible with the record declaration.
ast.target: 指示信息流生成器服务是否与记录声明兼容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get information about a list of feed generators.
ast.target: 获取关于信息流生成器列表的信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a skeleton of a feed provided by a feed generator. Auth is optional, depending on provider requirements, and provides the DID of the requester. Implemented by Feed Generator Service.
ast.target: 获取由信息流生成器提供的信息流骨架。认证是可选的，取决于提供商要求，并提供请求者的DID。由信息流生成器服务实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference to feed generator record describing the specific feed being requested.
ast.target: 对描述所请求特定信息流的信息流生成器记录的引用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get like records which reference a subject (by AT-URI and CID).
ast.target: 获取引用某个主题（通过AT-URI和CID）的点赞记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: AT-URI of the subject (eg, a post record).
ast.target: 主题的AT-URI（例如，帖子记录）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: CID of the subject record (aka, specific version of record), to filter likes.
ast.target: 主题记录的CID（即记录的特定版本），用于过滤点赞。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a feed of recent posts from a list (posts and reposts from any actors on the list). Does not require auth.
ast.target: 获取来自列表的最新帖子信息流（列表中任何参与者的帖子和转发）。不需要认证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) to the list record.
ast.target: 对列表记录的引用（AT-URI）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get posts in a thread. Does not require auth, but additional metadata and filtering will be applied for authed requests.
ast.target: 获取帖子线程中的帖子。不需要认证，但会为认证请求应用额外的元数据和过滤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) to post record.
ast.target: 对帖子记录的引用（AT-URI）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How many levels of reply depth should be included in response.
ast.target: 响应中应包含多少层回复深度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How many levels of parent (and grandparent, etc) post to include.
ast.target: 应包含多少层父级（以及祖父级等）帖子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets post views for a specified list of posts (by AT-URI). This is sometimes referred to as 'hydrating' a 'feed skeleton'.
ast.target: 获取指定帖子列表（通过AT-URI）的帖子视图。这有时被称为“完整化”一个“信息流骨架”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of post AT-URIs to return hydrated views for.
ast.target: 要返回完整视图的帖子AT-URI列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a list of quotes for a given post.
ast.target: 获取给定帖子的引用列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) of post record
ast.target: 帖子记录的引用（AT-URI）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If supplied, filters to quotes of specific version (by CID) of the post record.
ast.target: 如果提供，则过滤到帖子记录的特定版本（通过CID）的引用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a list of reposts for a given post.
ast.target: 获取给定帖子的转发列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If supplied, filters to reposts of specific version (by CID) of the post record.
ast.target: 如果提供，则过滤到帖子记录的特定版本（通过CID）的转发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a list of suggested feeds (feed generators) for the requesting account.
ast.target: 获取为请求账户推荐的信息流（信息流生成器）列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get a view of the requesting account's home timeline. This is expected to be some form of reverse-chronological feed.
ast.target: 获取请求账户的主时间线视图。预期是某种形式的逆时间顺序信息流。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Variant 'algorithm' for timeline. Implementation-specific. NOTE: most feed flexibility has been moved to feed generator mechanism.
ast.target: 时间线的变体“算法”。特定于实现。注意：大多数信息流灵活性已移至信息流生成器机制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record declaring a 'like' of a piece of subject content.
ast.target: 声明对某个主题内容“点赞”的记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record containing a Bluesky post.
ast.target: 包含Bluesky帖子的记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The primary post content. May be an empty string, if there are embeds.
ast.target: 帖子的主要内容。如果存在嵌入内容，可能为空字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DEPRECATED: replaced by app.bsky.richtext.facet.
ast.target: 已弃用：由app.bsky.richtext.facet取代。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Annotations of text (mentions, URLs, hashtags, etc)
ast.target: 文本的注释（提及、URL、话题标签等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates human language of post primary text content.
ast.target: 指示帖子主要文本内容的人类语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Self-label values for this post. Effectively content warnings.
ast.target: 此帖子的自标签值。实际上是内容警告。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Additional hashtags, in addition to any included in post text and facets.
ast.target: 额外的话题标签，除了帖子文本和分面中包含的任何标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Client-declared timestamp when this post was originally created.
ast.target: 客户端声明的帖子最初创建的时间戳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated: use facets instead.
ast.target: 已弃用：请改用分面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expected values are 'mention' and 'link'.
ast.target: 预期值为'mention'和'link'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated. Use app.bsky.richtext instead -- A text segment. Start is inclusive, end is exclusive. Indices are for utf16-encoded strings.
ast.target: 已弃用。请改用app.bsky.richtext -- 文本段。起始包含，结束不包含。索引用于utf16编码的字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record defining interaction rules for a post. The record key (rkey) of the postgate record must match the record key of the post, and that record must be in the same repository.
ast.target: 定义帖子交互规则的记录。帖子门控记录的记录键（rkey）必须与帖子的记录键匹配，并且该记录必须在同一仓库中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference (AT-URI) to the post record.
ast.target: 对帖子记录的引用（AT-URI）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of AT-URIs embedding this post that the author has detached from.
ast.target: 作者已分离的、嵌入此帖子的AT-URI列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables embedding of this post.
ast.target: 禁用此帖子的嵌入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record representing a 'repost' of an existing Bluesky post.
ast.target: 表示对现有Bluesky帖子的“转发”的记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find posts matching search criteria, returning views of those posts.
ast.target: 查找符合搜索条件的帖子，返回这些帖子的视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query string; syntax, phrase, boolean, and faceting is unspecified, but Lucene query syntax is recommended.
ast.target: 搜索查询字符串；语法、短语、布尔值和分面未指定，但推荐使用Lucene查询语法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the ranking order of results.
ast.target: 指定结果的排序顺序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter results for posts after the indicated datetime (inclusive). Expected to use 'sortAt' timestamp, which may not match 'createdAt'. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD).
ast.target: 过滤指示日期时间（包含）之后的帖子结果。预期使用'sortAt'时间戳，它可能与'createdAt'不匹配。可以是日期时间，或仅是ISO日期（YYYY-MM-DD）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter results for posts before the indicated datetime (not inclusive). Expected to use 'sortAt' timestamp, which may not match 'createdAt'. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYY-MM-DD).
ast.target: 筛选指定日期时间之前的帖子结果（不包含该时间）。预期使用'sortAt'时间戳，该时间戳可能与'createdAt'不匹配。可以是日期时间，或仅ISO日期（YYY-MM-DD）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts which mention the given account. Handles are resolved to DID before query-time. Only matches rich-text facet mentions.
ast.target: 筛选提及给定账户的帖子。句柄在查询前会被解析为DID。仅匹配富文本facet提及。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts by the given account. Handles are resolved to DID before query-time.
ast.target: 筛选由给定账户发布的帖子。句柄在查询前会被解析为DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts in the given language. Expected to be based on post language field, though server may override language detection.
ast.target: 筛选使用给定语言的帖子。预期基于帖子语言字段，但服务器可能会覆盖语言检测。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts with URLs (facet links or embeds) linking to the given domain (hostname). Server may apply hostname normalization.
ast.target: 筛选包含指向给定域名（主机名）的URL（facet链接或嵌入）的帖子。服务器可能会应用主机名规范化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts with links (facet links or embeds) pointing to this URL. Server may apply URL normalization or fuzzy matching.
ast.target: 筛选包含指向此URL的链接（facet链接或嵌入）的帖子。服务器可能会应用URL规范化或模糊匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter to posts with the given tag (hashtag), based on rich-text facet or tag field. Do not include the hash (#) prefix. Multiple tags can be specified, with 'AND' matching.
ast.target: 筛选包含给定标签（主题标签）的帖子，基于富文本facet或标签字段。不要包含井号（#）前缀。可以指定多个标签，使用'AND'匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional pagination mechanism; may not necessarily allow scrolling through entire result set.
ast.target: 可选的分页机制；不一定允许滚动浏览整个结果集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count of search hits. Optional, may be rounded/truncated, and may not be possible to paginate through all hits.
ast.target: 搜索命中数。可选，可能被四舍五入/截断，并且可能无法分页浏览所有命中结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Send information about interactions with feed items back to the feed generator that served them.
ast.target: 将与动态项目交互的信息发送回提供它们的动态生成器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record defining interaction gating rules for a thread (aka, reply controls). The record key (rkey) of the threadgate record must match the record key of the thread's root post, and that record must be in the same repository.
ast.target: 定义线程（即回复控制）交互门控规则的记录。线程门控记录的记录键（rkey）必须与线程根帖子的记录键匹配，并且该记录必须在同一存储库中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of hidden reply URIs.
ast.target: 隐藏回复URI列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow replies from actors mentioned in your post.
ast.target: 允许帖子中提及的参与者回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow replies from actors you follow.
ast.target: 允许你关注的参与者回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow replies from actors on a list.
ast.target: 允许列表中的参与者回复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Record declaring a 'block' relationship against another account. NOTE: blocks are public in Bluesky; see blog posts for details.
ast.target: 声明对另一个账户的'屏蔽'关系的记录。注意：在Bluesky中屏蔽是公开的；详情请参阅博客文章。

ast.name: description
ast.source: DID of the account to be blocked.
ast.target: 要屏蔽的账户的DID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A list of actors to apply an aggregate moderation action (mute/block) on.
